publications.title: Counting the cost of heat: the case for urgent solutions for cities
publications.description: This report reveals that extreme heat is emerging as one of the most underestimated threats to economic development worldwide, hammering city economies, overwhelming health systems, and falling hardest on women working on the frontlines of a hotter world.

publications.title: Handbook on macroeconomic modelling for climate resilience
publications.description: This handbook provides guidance for designing and implementing technical assistance on macroeconomic modelling to support climate resilient economic development in partner countries.

publications.title: Policy brief: Strengthening local government action on urban heat in Sri Lankan cities: UHI-City resilience scorecard & comprehensive guidance note
publications.description: This study seeks to understand how UHI risks are perceived, prioritised, and addressed in Sri Lankan cities, identify barriers and enablers influencing local government action.

publications.title: From urban heat islands to resilient cities: A conceptual framework for resilient and sustainable urban environments
publications.description: This study aims to synthesise existing knowledge on urban heat island mechanisms, patterns, and impacts; review strategies for reducing UHI and heat risks; and develop a conceptual framework to support urban heat resilience and sustainable city planning.

publications.title: How hazards turn into disasters: Perspectives of emergency responders
publications.description: This study investigates how disaster and emergency management professionals prioritize the factors that shape disaster risk and resilience across different contexts.

publications.title: Expanding the Sendai Framework for Disaster Risk Reduction to include animals
publications.description: Policy paper proposing an animal-inclusive approach to the Sendai Framework by integrating animal welfare, biodiversity and sentient beings into disaster risk reduction.

publications.title: Making Delhi Heat-Resilient: A roadmap with the focus on vulnerable groups
publications.description: The study aims to assess Delhi's increasing heat stress and looks into propose roadmap that combines year-round city-wide heat resilience measures with targeted interventions for vulnerable groups.

publications.title: Navigating the Indian power sector in the face of extreme heat: A scoping note
publications.description: This scoping note examines how intensifying heat-waves threaten every link of India’s power-sector value chain and outlines a roadmap for climate-ready electricity systems.

publications.title: Building a safer society through science and technology: a compendium of Korea’s science and technology-based disaster management
publications.description: This casebook highlights the implementation of science and technology-based disaster management, featuring 24 Korean practices across four thematic areas, along with Korea's success factors and remaining challenges. It is available in English and Korean.

publications.title: Financing heat resilience
publications.description: This report explores how governments can finance heat resilience through risk-informed investments, innovative financing mechanisms, and resilient infrastructure to protect lives, livelihoods, and economies from rising extreme heat risks.

publications.title: Knowing what the weather will do: A guide for practitioners on impact-based early warning
publications.description: This guidebook provides a novel approach and methodology for designing and implementing Impact-based early warning (IbEW) systems. it guides the co-development and integration of risk knowledge on hazards, exposure, vulnerabilities

publications.title: 24th Africa Working Group on Disaster Risk Reduction
publications.description: This outcome document of the 24th Africa Working Group on Disaster Risk Reduction.

publications.title: Barbados: Strengthening disaster resilience of MSMEs through business continuity planning: Guidance and sectoral templates
publications.description: This document provides guidance for Micro, Small and Medium-sized Enterprises (MSMEs) in Barbados to develop a basic Business Continuity Plan, eventually aligning with the highest international standards. It includes 5 sectoral templates.

publications.title: A framework towards assessing climate change and disaster-related losses of biodiversity and ecosystem services (FRAME-ECO)
publications.description: This report introduces a framework for assessing climate change and disaster-related losses of biodiversity and ecosystem services.

publications.title: Strengthening the disaster resilience of SMEs in Sendai
publications.description: This landscape study assesses how SMEs in Sendai city  perceive climate change and disaster risks and how they assess the resilience of their companies and the cities in which they operate.

publications.title: UNDRR Annual Report 2025
publications.description: The UNDRR Annual Report 2025 presents several important achievements that UNDRR marked in the year 2025

publications.title: When digital systems fail: An expert report on the hidden risks of our digital world
publications.description: This expert report examines how digital infrastructure, now central to essential services such as healthcare, finance, and emergency response, is creating new forms of systemic risk through increasing interdependence.

publications.title: UNDRR Regional Office for Africa Quarterly Newsletter (Jan-Mar 2026)
publications.description: UNDRR's Regional Office for Africa has published its first quarterly newsletter of 2026, detailing the major achievements of the work being done by the organisation.
